originalTitle: Coding a MOBA for Reinforcement Learning from scratch in C(ython)
title: Implementing Smooth Movement, Attacks, and Skills in a Cython MOBA for RL
summary: Implemented smooth player movement via camera system, attack targeting with mouse, tower and player health bars, and basic skills (blast and heal) in a Cython-based MOBA environment. Resolved data structure sync issues between grid and PID maps, enabling human-controlled gameplay.
